description_long: This is a tall, elegant ceramic vase with a flared rim and a gently tapering body. The exterior is richly decorated with alternating bands of deep red and cream, featuring intricate floral scrollwork and geometric motifs. The upper rim is adorned with a golden-yellow ornamental pattern resembling stylized petals or leaves, adding a regal touch. The central band showcases detailed floral designs in cream, set against a red background, while the area just below the rim is accented with triangular and linear geometric patterns. The vase has a smooth, glossy finish, suggesting it is glazed. Its overall appearance is both decorative and functional, suitable for display in refined urban settings.
description: A tall, ornate ceramic vase with red, cream, and gold floral and geometric patterns, featuring a flared rim and glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the golden petal motif on the rim and the central floral scrollwork band.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the continuation of the petal motif and the geometric band below the rim.
description_view_2: Angled view emphasizing the vase's tapering shape and the intricate floral patterns.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full wraparound of the golden rim motif and the detailed scrollwork.
attribute_location: public plaza or park decorative pedestal
